signals.raw:
Germany Inflation Jumps to 2.7% in March | YES (Confirmed) | HIGH confidence**
Germany's **inflation rate climbed to 2.7% in March 2026**, up from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates.[2] This marked the highest level since January 2024, driven primarily by a 7.2% spike in energy prices—the first yearly increase since December 2023.[2] Energy costs including fuel surged 20% and heati

signals.headline: 2026 Average Inflation Forecast Raised | YES (Confirmed) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
2026 Average Inflation Forecast Raised | YES (Confirmed) | HIGH confidence**
Economic institutes now project average inflation of **2.8% for 2026**, up from earlier expectations of just above 2%.[1][3] For 2027, inflation is forecast at 2.9%.[3]

signals.headline: BJP releases Kerala election manifesto with welfare promises | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BJP releases Kerala election manifesto with welfare promises | YES | HIGH confidence**

The BJP formally released its manifesto for Kerala Assembly elections, promising Rs 3,000 monthly pensions for needy women, widows, and senior citizens above 70, plus 20,000 litres of free water monthly per household[1].

signals.headline: IUML alleges BJP-LDF coordination to block UDF | YES | MED confidence**

IUML alleges BJP-LDF coordination to block UDF | YES | MED confidence**

PMA Salam, general secretary of the Indian Union Muslim League, stated that the BJP and LDF (Left Democratic Front) have joined hands to deny power to the UDF (United Democratic Front), which IUML supports[2].

signals.headline: Germany GDP 2026 Forecast Downgraded | NO (Growth Expected) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Germany GDP 2026 Forecast Downgraded | NO (Growth Expected) | HIGH confidence**
German economic research institutes expect GDP growth of only **0.6% in 2026**, significantly revised downward from prior forecasts due to an energy price shock triggered by the Iran war.[1][3] This represents weak but positive growth, not a contraction.
